title: erodium mouretii
intro: Erodium mouretii, also known as the Mediterranean storksbill, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Erodium mouretii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and even have antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Erodium mouretii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
